ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the plugin will not suggest links to replace block ids with
ast.target: 如果禁用，插件将不会建议用链接替换块 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the plugin will not automatically convert a block id to a link after pressing space (or another valid interrupter)
ast.target: 如果禁用，插件将不会在按下空格（或其他有效的中断符）后自动将块 ID 转换为链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the plugin will only use the names of files and not the contents of files to find links (disabling will disable aliases in results). If you are having performance issues, DISABLE THIS.
ast.target: 如果禁用，插件将仅使用文件名而非文件内容来查找链接（禁用将禁用结果中的别名）。如果您遇到性能问题，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will automatically load backlinks when a new file is opened. This may make files feel sluggish to open, and only applies to real-time linking.
ast.target: 如果启用，插件将在打开新文件时自动加载反向链接。这可能会使文件打开感觉迟钝，并且仅适用于实时链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will automatically refresh links when the vault is opened or a file is renamed, edited, deleted, or modified. This may take a couple of seconds (runs in background).
ast.target: 如果启用，插件将在打开保险库或重命名、编辑、删除或修改文件时自动刷新链接。这可能需要几秒钟（在后台运行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Refreshes the links in the current vault. This may take a couple of seconds.
ast.target: 刷新当前保险库中的链接。这可能需要几秒钟。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动加载实时反向链接

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 更新块 ID 时出错
